name: frontmatter-collapse-expand-regression
title: Markpad: naprawa rozwijania zwiniętego front matter
original_prompt:
$adhoc-sdlc plan i exec
jest błąd z renderowaniem frontmatter; po zwinięci nie da się rozwinąć.

entries.note: Started execution. Scope: reproduce frontmatter collapse/expand regression, add a focused regression test, apply minimal Svelte/helper fix, then verify with TS tests and Svelte checks.
Added regression test for the front matter disclosure structure and confirmed RED: current code still uses section plus button instead of native details/summary.

Replaced custom front matter section/button disclosure with native details/summary, kept per-file collapsed state synchronized from the details open state, and adjusted CSS marker/chevron handling. Regression test now passes.

verification.command: npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts && npm run check && npm run build
verification.outcome: npx -y tsx --test scripts/frontMatterDisclosure.test.ts: RED before implementation, GREEN after native details/summary change. npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts: 21 tests passed, 0 failed. npm run check: 0 errors, 14 existing warnings. npm run build: exit 0, existing warnings only. Browser dev-server smoke could not exercise the app because running outside Tauri fails on missing window.__TAURI__.invoke.

final_result: Fixed the front matter collapse/expand regression by replacing the custom section/button disclosure with native details/summary, preserving per-file collapsed state and existing properties editing. Added a regression test and verified with TS tests, svelte-check, and frontend build.
